title: lotononis stricta
intro: Lotononis stricta, also known as the "poor man's umbrella" or "sweet lotononis," is a plant species within the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lotononis stricta include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to extract its medicinal properties, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or dried powder for medicinal purposes.
